channel.title: Events Participated on AWS Portfolio Workshop
channel.description: Recent content in Events Participated on AWS Portfolio Workshop

item.title: AWS First Cloud AI Journey Community Day 2026
item.description:
AWS First Cloud AI Journey Community Day 2026

🎯 Context and participation objectives

Context

As AI and Cloud Computing continue to evolve rapidly, AWS First Cloud AI Journey Community Day 2026 connected Vietnam’s Cloud and AI community and shared real-world enterprise deployment practices on AWS.

item.title: Mini Meetup – First Cloud AI Journey 06/06/2026
item.description:
Mini Meetup – First Cloud AI Journey 06/06/2026

🎯 Context and participation objectives

Context

Mini Meetup – First Cloud AI Journey followed the Community Day with a more hands-on focus on technical topics and career development for young Cloud practitioners.
